/usr/bin/ar qc ../../lib/libsmbjson_test_fortran.a CMakeFiles/smbjson_test_fortran.dir/smbjson_testingTools.F90.o CMakeFiles/smbjson_test_fortran.dir/test_idchildtable.F90.o CMakeFiles/smbjson_test_fortran.dir/test_cells.F90.o CMakeFiles/smbjson_test_fortran.dir/test_mesh.F90.o CMakeFiles/smbjson_test_fortran.dir/test_parser.F90.o CMakeFiles/smbjson_test_fortran.dir/test_read_planewave.F90.o CMakeFiles/smbjson_test_fortran.dir/test_read_dielectricSlab.F90.o CMakeFiles/smbjson_test_fortran.dir/test_read_thinSlot.F90.o CMakeFiles/smbjson_test_fortran.dir/test_read_sgbc.F90.o CMakeFiles/smbjson_test_fortran.dir/test_read_currentInjection.F90.o CMakeFiles/smbjson_test_fortran.dir/test_read_sphere.F90.o CMakeFiles/smbjson_test_fortran.dir/test_read_airplane.F90.o CMakeFiles/smbjson_test_fortran.dir/test_read_lumped_fixture.F90.o CMakeFiles/smbjson_test_fortran.dir/test_read_background.F90.o CMakeFiles/smbjson_test_fortran.dir/test_unrecognized_key.F90.o CMakeFiles/smbjson_test_fortran.dir/test_read_holland1981.F90.o
/usr/bin/ranlib ../../lib/libsmbjson_test_fortran.a
